base_template.name: TRMM_Base v3.1
base_template.html:
{% block header_title %}{% endblock %}

Report Date: {{ report_run_timestamp.strftime('%B %d, %Y') }}

{% block content %}{% endblock %}
{% block footer %}
{% endblock %}

template.name: Agent Uptime_By Client (html) v3.2
template.template_variables:
report_run_timestamp: !now
timedelta_30_days: !now days=-30
data_sources:
  allFieldsAlerts:
    model: alert
    only:
      - agent__hostname
      - message
      - alert_time
      - resolved_on
      - alert_type
      - agent_id
      - resolved
    filter:
      agent__site__client_id: "{{client.id}}"
